vm.name: h1
vm.exec:
mkdir -p /run/sshd chmod 755 /run/sshd mkdir -p /root/.ssh chown root:root /root/.ssh chmod 700 /root/.ssh touch /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chown root:root /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d printf 'PermitRootLogin yes
PubkeyAuthentication yes
AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys
PasswordAuthentication yes
UsePAM yes
' > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-vnx-management.conf ssh-keygen -A chown root:root /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true chmod 600 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key 2>/dev/null || true chmod 644 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true pkill sshd 2>/dev/null || true /usr/sbin/sshd -f /etc/ssh/sshd_config

vm.name: h2
vm.exec:
mkdir -p /run/sshd chmod 755 /run/sshd mkdir -p /root/.ssh chown root:root /root/.ssh chmod 700 /root/.ssh touch /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chown root:root /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d printf 'PermitRootLogin yes
PubkeyAuthentication yes
AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys
PasswordAuthentication yes
UsePAM yes
' > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-vnx-management.conf ssh-keygen -A chown root:root /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true chmod 600 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key 2>/dev/null || true chmod 644 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true pkill sshd 2>/dev/null || true /usr/sbin/sshd -f /etc/ssh/sshd_config

vm.name: r1
vm.exec:
mkdir -p /run/sshd chmod 755 /run/sshd mkdir -p /root/.ssh chown root:root /root/.ssh chmod 700 /root/.ssh touch /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chown root:root /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d printf 'PermitRootLogin yes
PubkeyAuthentication yes
AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys
PasswordAuthentication yes
UsePAM yes
' > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-vnx-management.conf ssh-keygen -A chown root:root /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true chmod 600 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key 2>/dev/null || true chmod 644 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true pkill sshd 2>/dev/null || true /usr/sbin/sshd -f /etc/ssh/sshd_config

vm.name: r2
vm.exec:
mkdir -p /run/sshd chmod 755 /run/sshd mkdir -p /root/.ssh chown root:root /root/.ssh chmod 700 /root/.ssh touch /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chown root:root /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d printf 'PermitRootLogin yes
PubkeyAuthentication yes
AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys
PasswordAuthentication yes
UsePAM yes
' > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-vnx-management.conf ssh-keygen -A chown root:root /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true chmod 600 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key 2>/dev/null || true chmod 644 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true pkill sshd 2>/dev/null || true /usr/sbin/sshd -f /etc/ssh/sshd_config

vm.name: h3
vm.exec:
mkdir -p /run/sshd chmod 755 /run/sshd mkdir -p /root/.ssh chown root:root /root/.ssh chmod 700 /root/.ssh touch /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chown root:root /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d printf 'PermitRootLogin yes
PubkeyAuthentication yes
AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys
PasswordAuthentication yes
UsePAM yes
' > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-vnx-management.conf ssh-keygen -A chown root:root /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true chmod 600 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key 2>/dev/null || true chmod 644 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true pkill sshd 2>/dev/null || true /usr/sbin/sshd -f /etc/ssh/sshd_config

vm.name: h4
vm.exec:
mkdir -p /run/sshd chmod 755 /run/sshd mkdir -p /root/.ssh chown root:root /root/.ssh chmod 700 /root/.ssh touch /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chown root:root /root/.ssh/authorized_keys chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d printf 'PermitRootLogin yes
PubkeyAuthentication yes
AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys
PasswordAuthentication yes
UsePAM yes
' > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-vnx-management.conf ssh-keygen -A chown root:root /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true chmod 600 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key 2>/dev/null || true chmod 644 /etc/ssh/ssh_host_*_key.pub 2>/dev/null || true pkill sshd 2>/dev/null || true /usr/sbin/sshd -f /etc/ssh/sshd_config

vm.name: hmanagement
vm.exec:
mkdir -p /root/.ssh chown root:root /root/.ssh /root/.ssh/id_ed25519 /root/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub chmod 700 /root/.ssh chmod 600 /root/.ssh/id_ed25519 chmod 644 /root/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub printf 'Host 10.200.*.*
 User root
 IdentityFile /root/.ssh/id_ed25519
 StrictHostKeyChecking accept-new
' > /root/.ssh/config chmod 600 /root/.ssh/config
